files.name: asset_log_coverage.csv
files.description_tr: Varlık düzeyinde beklenen ve alınan log kaynağı kapsamı.
files.description_en: Expected and received log-source coverage by asset.

files.description_tr: Kontrol, Wazuh rule, ATT&CK tekniği ve görülme durumu.
files.description_en: Control, Wazuh rule, ATT&CK technique and observed state.

files.description_tr: Her varlık-log kaynağı çifti için expected, observed ve last_seen.
files.description_en: Expected, observed and last_seen for each asset-log-source pair.
